task_completion.description: Open the approved specification document to check the correct dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'panel_approved_spec.txt' from the desktop, showing the correct dimensions.

task_completion.description: Open the incorrect CAD file in SolveSpace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace application is open, and the window title or canvas indicates that 'panel_wrong_dims.slvs' is loaded. The initial incorrect constraints (95.0 and 50.0) may be visible.

task_completion.description: Modify the width constraint to match the approved specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SolveSpace canvas or property browser, the width constraint is shown being edited or successfully updated to 120.0.

task_completion.description: Modify the height constraint to match the approved specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SolveSpace canvas or property browser, the height constraint is shown being edited or successfully updated to 75.0.

task_completion.description: Save the corrected CAD file with the new filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box in SolveSpace showing the file being saved as 'panel_corrected.slvs' in the /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ directory, or the SolveSpace window title updating to 'panel_corrected.slvs'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace graphical user interface to modify the CAD file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the SolveSpace application window to change constraints, rather than using a text editor or terminal to manually alter the raw .slvs text file.

integrity.description: The agent saved the new file using the application's Save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace 'Save As' dialog or menu should be visible, rather than terminal commands like 'cp' or 'mv' being used to duplicate and rename the file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely opened and read the specification file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'panel_approved_spec.txt' file must be visibly opened on screen at some point before the constraints are corrected, proving the agent didn't just use prior knowledge of the correct dimensions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct dimensions to be set in the CAD file are 120.0mm for the width and 75.0mm for the height. The original incorrect dimensions in the starting file are 95.0mm (width) and 50.0mm (height). The specification document is located at /home/ga/Desktop/panel_approved_spec.txt. The final corrected file must be saved exactly as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/panel_corrected.slvs.
